basic_details.job_title: IIM Ahmedabad Ad Hoc Academic Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Ahmedabad (IIM Ahmedabad) Ad Hoc Academic Associate Notification 2026 has been released on Not Mentioned on the official website https://www.iima.ac.in/. A total of Not Mentioned vacancies have been announced through the IIM Ahmedabad Ad Hoc Academic Associate Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Educational Qualification: MBA in Human Resources Management (HRM) Age Limit: Maximum 35 years Only candidates with relevant specialization in Master’s degree will be considered

important_instructions: Only online applications will be accepted. Fulfilling minimum eligibility does not guarantee a call for interview. The Institute reserves the right to reject any application at any stage without assigning any reason.

content_sections.heading: IIM Ahmedabad Ad Hoc Academic Associate HRM Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Download IIM Ahmedabad Ad Hoc Academic Associate HRM Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIM Ahmedabad Ad Hoc Academic Associate Recruitment 2026 Overview

rows.indian_institute_of_management_ahmedabad: Rs. 35,000/- to Rs. 40,000/- per month (consolidated) + Rs. 8,000/- housing support

content_sections.heading: IIM Ahmedabad Ad Hoc Academic Associate Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
Job Responsibilities of Ad Hoc Academic Associate (HRM)
content_sections.text: Teaching Assistance (Primary Activity): Assist faculty members in 100 to 150 sessions per year Attend classes and monitor academic discipline Correction/grading of answer sheets, quizzes, projects, and assignments Assist in course design, preparation of reading lists, handouts, simulations, and slides Conduct attendance marking, class participation evaluation, and remedial sessions Coordinate with Academic Offices and participate in exam/quiz invigilation Research Activities (Secondary Activity): Assist faculty in research, case writing, teaching notes, and paper writing Learn required tools, techniques, and software for high-quality research Coordinate with R&P Office and Case Unit for research dissemination

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria Ad Hoc Academic Associate Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Educational Qualification: MBA in Human Resources Management (HRM) Age Limit: Maximum 35 years Only candidates with relevant specialization in Master’s degree will be considered

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions:
content_sections.text: Only online applications will be accepted. Fulfilling minimum eligibility does not guarantee a call for interview. The Institute reserves the right to reject any application at any stage without assigning any reason.

content_sections.heading: IIM Ahmedabad Ad Hoc Academic Associate Important Links
content_sections.text: Apply Online: Click here Official Notification PDF: Click here Official Website: Click here Join Arattai Channel: Click Here Join Telegram Channel: Click Here Join WhatsApp Channel: Click Here Sarkari Result: Click Here Download Mobile App: Click Here

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIM Ahmedabad Academic Associate 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online is 13 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary for IIM Ahmedabad Ad Hoc Academic Associate?
faq.answer: Monthly consolidated salary in the range of Rs. 35,000/- to Rs. 40,000/- plus Rs. 8,000/- towards housing support.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for IIMA HRM Academic Associate?
faq.answer: Candidates must have MBA in Human Resources Management (HRM).

faq.question: Q4. What is the duration of the Academic Associate position at IIM Ahmedabad?
faq.answer: The duration is six months with immediate joining.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for IIM Ahmedabad Academic Associate Recruitment?
faq.answer: Maximum age is 35 years.

faq.question: Q6. What are the main duties of Academic Associate at IIMA?
faq.answer: Primary duty is teaching assistance to faculty members (100-150 sessions per year) and secondary duty is assisting in research and case writing.

faq.question: Q7. How to apply for IIM Ahmedabad Ad Hoc Academic Associate 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must Apply Online Only through the official link on the IIMA website latest by 13 July 2026.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent faculty position at IIM Ahmedabad?
faq.answer: No, it is an Ad Hoc / Contractual position meant as a stepping stone for aspiring academicians and PhD aspirants.

faq.question: Q9. Will IIM Ahmedabad provide housing support to Academic Associates?
faq.answer: Yes, Rs. 8,000/- per month is provided towards housing support in addition to salary.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for IIMA Academic Associate HRM?
faq.answer: Applications will be scrutinized, and shortlisted candidates will be called for written test / skill test / interview via email.
